summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of WILDWAVE landing page updates - all requirements successfully implemented and functional
passed_tests: Cookie banner displays on first visit with correct Swiss DSG compliance
Cookie banner has 'Nur Essenzielle' and 'Alle akzeptieren' buttons with correct German text
Cookie consent is properly saved to localStorage with all cookie types
Cookie banner disappears after accepting and doesn't show on return visits
Professional logo with geometric icon displays correctly in header
Professional logo displays correctly in footer (white version)
Statistics section successfully removed from about section - no statistics numbers found
About section displays clean text content without statistics
Navigation functionality works correctly for all sections (Services, About, Contact)
Contact form is fully functional with successful form submission
Page layout and design are professional and clean
